sentiment: Seeing familiar tools find new purpose — a quiet reminder that what we build outlives what we meant it for.

stories.title: Midjourney Medical
stories.summary: Image generation meets medical imaging — the creative tools we build find purposes their makers never imagined.

stories.title: Hospitals and universities repurposing drugs at 90% lower cost
stories.summary: Open approaches to medicine — when institutions collaborate, treatments become accessible.

stories.title: Emacs 31 Is Around the Corner: The Changes I'm Daily Driving
stories.summary: Decades later, a tool still being shaped by the hands that daily depend on it.
